title: SaveEnvelope
description: Outer wrapper around an exportable save record. Carries the `intent` discriminator (save vs replay vs fixture), the per-installation `mac` seam (M5+, optional in M4), and the canonical `engineHash` + `contentPackHashes` pin. Authoritative doctrine: docs/architecture/save-envelope-mac.md and docs/architecture/save-migration.md. Owning task: tasks/mvp/08-persistence/18-save-envelope-and-intent.md.

envelopeVersion.description: Envelope-format revision counter, independent of the inner save body's `saveVersion`. Currently `1`.

intent.description: Discriminator. `save` is device-local and may carry `mac`. `replay` is shared/exported and strips player-identifying fields per save-migration.md § Privacy strip on replay export. `fixture` is canonical-engine-fixture and requires `signature` (Ed25519 by an engine-fixture key).

saveVersion.description: Inner save body's schema version. Range-checked here independently of `save.schema.json` so an out-of-range version is rejected before migrators run. Bound to the optional `mac` once MAC is enabled (save-envelope-mac.md § 4).

engineHash.description: 16-hex-char xxh64 digest of the engine build that authored the save. Pinned per `engine-hash.md`.

contentPackHashes.description: Closed list of pack identity records present at save time. Capped to bound parser memory before schema validation runs. Same shape as `save.schema.json:packHashes`.

body.description: Inner save record validated against `save.schema.json` after envelope acceptance. Treated opaquely at the envelope layer.

mac.description: Optional HMAC-SHA-256 over canonical-JSON of `{ envelopeVersion, intent, saveVersion, engineHash, contentPackHashes, body }`. Absent in M4. Required in M5+ when `intent === "save"` AND user opted into cloud sync. See save-envelope-mac.md.

signature.description: Optional Ed25519 signature. Present only when `intent === "fixture"` and the fixture is canonical (signed by an `engine-fixture` key). Verified per pack-signing.md § Verification order.
